subject: [PATCH v3 5/8] io_uring/kbuf: add recycling for kernel managed buffer rings

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the potential impact of this change on existing code and suggested adding more tests to ensure correctness.

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch series introduces a new interface for recycling kernel-managed buffer rings in io_uring, allowing buffers to be reused and reducing memory allocation overhead.
